Behavioral Health Services

Source: New York State Department of Health, Quality Assurance Reporting Requirements (QARR) Health Disparities dataset. Includes annual performance measures for Medicaid Managed Care and Commercial plans from 2020 to 2024, aligned with NCQA standards and stratified by demographic characteristics to support disparity analysis..

Trend in Behavioral Health Performance

Five-year trend (2020–2024) of the selected measure, showing weighted rates across subgroups defined by the chosen breakdown. This view helps identify performance patterns, subgroup differences, and changes over time.

Definition: Measure description will update based on the selected measure.

Selected Rate
-
Rate for the current filtered view
Numerator
-
Summed numerator in current view
Denominator
-
Summed denominator in current view
Reporting Groups
-
Distinct subgroup values returned

Top Measures Table

Statewide measure-level summary for the selected year and payer.

Measure Rate Numerator Denominator

Top Measures

Semi-radial view of the highest rates for the selected year, payer, and main breakdown.

Measure → Region → Performance Band

Distribution of performance levels across regions for the selected year and payer.

Measure → Race → Performance Band

Sankey view of the selected year and payer, showing how measures connect to race groups and performance bands based on weighted rates.

Developed by: Leyla Sehhat | LinkedIn Profile
Source: Public NYS QARR data, Behavioral Health Measures (2020–2024)
Rate Calculation Method: Weighted rate = Sum(Numerator) / Sum(Denominator)
This dashboard is for demonstration purposes only. Data are publicly available and not independently validated. Results should not be interpreted as official performance measures.
